layout.structure: Sidebar navigation (w-64) with fixed top-bar for global actions/breadcrumbs
layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, utilizing p-6 to p-8 for containers to provide breathing room
layout.grid: Bento-style or Control Room density depending on the page (e.g., Dashboard uses tight gap-6 Control Room grid, Review Queue uses single-column generous flow)

components.card: Flat background (bg-[#121214]), 1px subtle border (border-[#27272a]), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle border color lighten.
components.button: Sharp corners or minimal radius (rounded-md), solid vibrant primary for CTAs, transparent with 1px border for secondary. Always include focus:ring-2.
components.input: Shadcn input structure, customized with dark background (bg-[#09090b]), border-border, text-primary. Focus states must have higher contrast ring.
components.draft_card: Review Queue specific: Resembles an email editor layout. Header with To/From/Subject with monospace fonts for email addresses. Body in a well-padded area. Prominent Approve/Skip/Edit actions.
components.status_badge: Subtle background tint (e.g., bg-green-500/10 text-green-400) with 1px border (border-green-500/20). Sharp or slightly rounded corners.

accessibility.contrast: Text contrast strictly follows WCAG AA. Interactive elements must have focus states with focus:ring-2.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap animations with @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) or Tailwind's motion-safe modifier.

visual_enhancers.safety_pill: Persistent top-nav indicator: 'No auto-send / Human approval required'. Use warning/info colors to ensure it's always visible.
visual_enhancers.icons: lucide-react for consistent, clean, and professional stroke icons.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the skeleton of the layout using subtle borders (border-collapse style) to give a technical, data-driven feel.

image_urls.description: Dark minimal abstract texture, to be used for the login page background or subtle empty state backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the 7 requested pages (Dashboard, Company Profile, Campaign Builder, Leads, Campaigns, Review Queue, Mailbox Connections) using React, React Router, and Tailwind CSS.
Maintain the dark aesthetic using the provided colors (e.g., bg-[#09090b]). Do NOT use generic purple or teal gradients.
Use Outfit for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text. Install via Google Fonts or similar.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them to match the 'Grid Borders / Technical' look (flat, crisp edges, subtle 1px borders, no soft shadows).
Keep the 'Human approval required' safety pill visible globally, likely in the top-nav.
Ensure the Review Queue page feels like an email triage interface with clear read/edit/approve flows.
Add the recommended data-testid attributes to key interactive elements.
